nodes.title: negative prompt
widgets_values: low quality, blurry, flicker, jitter, horror, emergency, blood, injury, surgery, diagnosis result, readable private patient information, real name, real hospital logo, random text, subtitles, watermark, extra people, extra limbs, distorted face, warped hands, distorted CT scanner, changing clothes, identity drift
